# Sample Project (High Fixture)

[![CI](https://example.com/badge.svg)](https://example.com/ci)

This sample project demonstrates an exemplary code-documentation
posture: every README arrival question is answered, every docs
page is current, every public API is documented, and every
internal link resolves.

## Overview

A small Python library that does one thing: takes a list of
numbers and returns their arithmetic mean. The implementation
fits in a single module. The example surface is intentionally
narrow so the fixture stays calibrated.

## Audience

This project is for Python developers who want a minimal,
well-documented utility for numeric aggregation, and for
documentation-tooling tests that need an exemplar fixture.

## Install

```bash
pip install sample-project
```

Requires Python 3.11 or newer.

## Status

Stable. The public API surface is frozen at v1.0.

## Documentation

See the [docs/](docs/overview.md) tree for the full reference,
the [tutorial](docs/tutorial.md), and the [API reference](docs/api.md).
